subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy Call which hath been raised from the right hand of the Throne of Thy majesty and hath drawn unto it all hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا ندائک قد ارتفع عن یمین عرش عظمتک فاجتذب به قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
